task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is opened or selected in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sample Order Lines' in the Data Panel on the left side of the screen or in the dataset selection menu.

task_completion.description: Verify a 'Language Narrative' visualization is added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visualization block on the main canvas that contains automatically generated text summarizing data, or the Language Narrative icon selected in the visualization types menu.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Sales' and 'Profit' are added to the visualization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sales' and 'Profit' in the Grammar Panel (e.g., under Values) for the active visualization, or explicitly analyzed in the generated narrative text on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Product Category' is added to the visualization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Product Category' in the Grammar Panel for the active visualization, or explicitly used as the breakdown category in the generated narrative text.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Level of Detail' property is set to the maximum (7).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the visualization properties panel (usually at the bottom left) showing the 'Level of Detail' setting adjusted to 7.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Category_Narrative'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Category_Narrative' in the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop application or in a completed 'Save'/'Save As' dialog.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the workbook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OAD interface with mouse clicks, drag-and-drop actions, and menu navigation, not a terminal window creating or modifying files.

integrity.description: Verify the narrative is a genuine OAD visualization and not a mocked text box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The narrative should be inside an OAD visualization container with standard grammar and properties panels visible, not a standard static text box.

integrity.description: Verify the narrative text was generated by the system, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen typing the summary text manually; the text should appear automatically after configuring the grammar panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is an Oracle Analytics Desktop workbook saved as 'Category_Narrative.dva' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The visualization must be a 'Language Narrative' type. The required measures are 'Sales' and 'Profit', and the required dimension is 'Product Category'. The Level of Detail setting must be set to 7 (maximum).
